record.field: ⚠️ SLA about to expire: {{ object.number }} – {{ object.name }}

Dear {{ object.user_id.name or 'Team' }},

The SLA deadline for ticket {{ object.number }} – {{ object.name }} is approaching or has expired.

Deadline: {{ object.sla_deadline }}

Please take action as soon as possible.
Your ticket {{ object.number }} is awaiting your response

Dear {{ object.partner_name or 'Customer' }},

We noticed that ticket {{ object.number }} – {{ object.name }} has been inactive for several days.

If you still need assistance, please reply to this email or log in to the portal.

If we do not hear back from you, the ticket may be closed automatically.
Your ticket {{ object.number }} has been closed

Dear {{ object.partner_name or 'Customer' }},

Ticket {{ object.number }} – {{ object.name }} has been automatically closed due to inactivity.

If you still need assistance, please open a new ticket and reference the original ticket number.
How did we do? Rate your support experience for {{ object.number }}

Dear {{ object.partner_name or 'Customer' }},

Thank you for contacting our support team regarding ticket {{ object.number }} – {{ object.name }}.

We would love to hear your feedback. Please rate your experience:

👍 Satisfied   👎 Not Satisfied

Thank you for helping us improve!
